name: lead-pilot
description: Automates rental lead ingestion, response drafting, and review workflow for property managers

commands.name: leads:setup
commands.description: First-run setup — creates Notion database and initializes state file

commands.name: leads:check
commands.description: Poll Gmail for new leads, ingest them, and draft responses

commands.name: leads:review
commands.description: Show next lead needing review — full thread and drafted response

commands.name: leads:edit
commands.description: Iterate conversationally on a drafted response

commands.name: leads:approve
commands.description: Approve a drafted response and copy to clipboard

commands.name: leads:skip
commands.description: Dismiss a lead without responding — moves to Archived

commands.name: leads:add
commands.description: Manually add a lead (for Facebook or walk-ins)

commands.name: leads:add-property
commands.description: Add a property from listing copy or URL — Claude parses into YAML config
